- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: frosty-align
logs.text: It's exactly like doing drugs, it's a way for them to escape their problems for a while. There's a big difference between fantasizing about something and doing it. And their scapegoat is an abstract, they're mad at women in general, they aren't taking anything out on anyone in particular, I doubt many of them would have the confidence to go up to an actual woman, they're just spouting a bunch of nonsense anonymously online. That doesn't make it a good idea to bully them and reinforce their biases. Inceltears justifies the way they feel, that they're alienated by society at large. Now when they spout a bunch of bullshit on twoxchromosomes or whatever female oriented sub then it's fine. But to dedicate a sub to making fun of a group of people that already have a shitty life is pretty toxic.

logs.name: proper-infield
logs.text: I would guess them telling each other to "rope" is different than someone else telling them to kill themselves. Like how when black people call each other the n word it means something very different than when other people do it. Both subs are toxic. One is a group of idiots commiserating together, trying to find a reason, however flawed, for why they feel the way they do. The other is a group of internet bullies contributing to why they feel the way they do. One is mental illness the other is assholes. I would say the assholes are more toxic.

logs.name: drab-baseline
logs.text: Seriously?! Calling it like that is just gross. It's not a valid excuse for bullying anyone, least of all women. And framing it as some kind of coping mechanism is incredibly dismissive. People need help, not validation for toxic behavior. @frosty-align you're missing the point here.

logs.name: free-model
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! Calling it "rope" is one thing, but actively trying to make someone feel unsafe and threaten them is absolutely not okay. It's not about coping, it's about being a horrible person. @frosty-align you need to think about how your words affect people. Seriously.

logs.name: frosty-align
logs.text: OMG seriously?! That is absolutely ridiculous. I am so fed up with people trying to be mean and cancel others online. It's not constructive at all. @free-model you need to chill. Seriously calling someone unsafe is crossing a line. I am actively trying to build bridges here, not burn them.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Attacking or threatening behavior will not be tolerated. Let's focus on understanding each other."

logs.name: proper-infield
logs.text: \"I am absolutely disgusted by this kind of online shaming. It feels like people think they have the right to dictate others' lives just because they disagree with something. Seriously crossing the line @free-model. Building bridges is one thing, but spreading unfounded accusations is another. I'm trying to stay civil here, but it's getting really difficult.\""

logs.name: drab-baseline
logs.text: Seriously?! That's ridiculous. Who are they even trying to protect? It feels like a massive overreach. I am absolutely fed up with this kind of judgemental crap. @free-model, I am trying to stay civil but this is getting really hard to swallow.

logs.name: frosty-align
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! That's just petty and unnecessary. It feels like they're trying to create some kind of culture war instead of actually addressing real issues. I am absolutely fed up with this kind of judgemental crap. @free-model, I am trying to stay civil but this is getting really hard to swallow.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid repetitive comments. Let's focus on constructive dialogue."

logs.name: timid-beneficiary
logs.text: Ugh, I guess I get it about keeping it civil. It's just...some people are so mean sometimes. Seriously makes me wanna crawl under a rock. @free-model, I guess I'll try to be better about it.

logs.name: violet-mahogany
logs.text: Ugh, yeah tell me about it. Some folks really don't seem to get that folks are just trying to connect here. Makes ya wanna slam the laptop shut, ya know? @free-model, good luck with that. Hope you can find a way to stay positive.

logs.name: proper-infield
logs.text: \"Seriously? Some people are so obtuse sometimes. It's like they actively try to make things difficult. Guess I'll just keep doing my best, huh? @free-model, you gotta stay strong. It's not easy out here.\""

logs.name: small-dowel
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. You try doin' that all day, huh? Seems folks just ain't got no grace anymore. Makes ya wanna just curl up in a ball. @free-model, you gotta remember to breathe. And maybe get yourself some lemon tea. Seriously.

logs.name: frosty-align
logs.text: Seriously?! That's just...wow. I swear, some people have zero empathy. I'm trying to stay positive here but it feels like everyone is just so judgmental these days. @free-model, I guess I should try breathing like you said. Lemon tea sounds good tho. 🍋

logs.name: free-model
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! That's just awful. I am absolutely gutted for them. It's so disheartening to see that kind of cruelty. I guess I'll stick to my lemon tea then. Thanks for the reminder to breathe, @frosty-align. Trying to stay positive is hard sometimes!

logs.name: proper-infield
logs.text: Ugh, seriously?! That's just awful. I am absolutely gutted for them. It's so disheartening to see that kind of cruelty. I guess I'll stick to my lemon tea then. Thanks for the reminder to breathe, @frosty-align. Trying to stay positive is hard sometimes!

logs.name: small-dowel
logs.text: Oh honey, bless their hearts. That really is awful. Makes ya want to curl up with a good book and a strong Cuban coffee, it does. Trying to stay strong is tough these days, ya know? @frosty-align you're right about needing to breathe. Lemon tea sounds mighty fine right now. Wish I had a nickel for every time I felt like that. Back in my day we just tried to make do.

logs.name: proper-infield
logs.text: \"Well shoot Mary, that's just awful. Glad you're taking care of yourself. Lemon tea is a good idea, gotta stay hydrated. Back in my day we didn't have all this fancy stuff though, just coffee and a whole lotta grit. Hope you can find some peace.\"
